title: Italian Flatbread with Cherry Toppings
description: A sweet and savory flatbread topped with cherry compote and crispy prosciutto, perfect for a dessert or snack.
instructions: Roll out the flatbread and place on a baking sheet.
Spread the cherry jam evenly over the flatbread, leaving a 1/2-inch border around the edges.
Top the jam with fresh cherries.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until the flatbread is crispy and the cherries are tender.
Meanwhile, cook the prosciutto in a pan over medium heat until crispy.
Remove the flatbread from the oven and top with crispy prosciutto and parmesan cheese.
Drizzle with balsamic vinegar and serve.
